title: Symbian OS
html: Stub. Pre-iPhone-era smartphone OS (Nokia). Permission model: Symbian Signed apps get all privileges automatically; unsigned apps prompt the user at install. By 2009-2011, the dominant target of mobile malware (24 of the 46 samples in Felt et al.). First mentioned in 2025 06 01 mobile malware survey felt.

related.label: Mobile malware survey — credential theft, premium SMS, 2FA bypass, IMEI defenses
Mobile malware survey (Felt et al.) — methodology, data set, novelty/amusement, selling user info
